posts.text:
I’m delighted to welcome Sukanto Mahanti to the TruVs team! 👏

Sukanto and I go back a long way — we worked together during our Tech Mahindra (ex-Satyam) days, and it’s always special when professional journeys come full circle. Over the years, Sukanto has built deep expertise across program management, delivery leadership, AWS, GenAI, and process modernization, consistently delivering strong business outcomes.

At TruVs, Sukanto will be helping us build and scale our Amazon Business Solutions practice, with a strong focus on process modernization and digital transformation. His blend of hands-on delivery experience, strategic thinking, and people leadership will be a tremendous asset as we continue our growth journey.

Welcome aboard, Sukanto — excited to build the next chapter together! 🚀
#WelcomeToTruVs #Leadership #DigitalTransformation #ProcessModernization #AWS #GenAI #Grateful

profile.occupation: Director - Amazon Business Solutions @ TruVs Inc | AWS Certified Solutions Architect

resharedPost.text:
People thought my "Accelerate Your PM Career" was easily a $1000 course. I taught it for FREE to 1150 people live over 12hrs as my way of paying it forward. We covered the following topics:
💚 Career mental models, north star and planning
💚 Growing within your company
💚 Finding great roles at other companies
💚 How to develop product thinking skills
💚 How to develop execution skills
💚 How to develop leadership skills
💚 How to develop high agency
💚 How to develop executive presence

I want you all to kick start the year with a playbook for how to make step function changes into your skills and grow your career in 2025!

If you missed the course and want a video recording, submit this form to  get instructions. Accelerate Your PM Career Recording- https://lnkd.in/g2VpgJMq
​
If you think this course will be valuable to the PM community, please do like & reshare this post!

comments.text: Best gift to kick off 2025 from the one and best Satish! 👆 Comment to amplify reach!
